variables.name: additional_extensions
variables.description: Additional extensions configuration in YAML format to append to the config.

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: agentapi_version
variables.description: The version of AgentAPI to install.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The folder to run Goose in.

variables.description: The model to use for Goose (e.g., claude-3-5-sonnet-latest).

variables.description: The provider to use for Goose (e.g., anthropic).

variables.name: goose_version
variables.description: The version of Goose to install.

variables.name: icon
variables.description: The icon to use for the app.

variables.name: post_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after installing Goose.

variables.name: pre_install_script
variables.description: Custom script to run before installing Goose.
